notes:
Monthly CPI release. The Federal Reserve's own working paper (Kalshi NBER 2026) showed
Kalshi CPI contracts beat Bloomberg consensus surprises on out-of-sample windows.
Information edge: synthesize nowcasts (Atlanta Fed GDPNow, Truflation, Redbook, ADP),
regional Fed surveys, jobless claims trend, and Fed speaker tone in the 3-day window
preceding release. Median market participant trades on consensus forecast headlines.

sources_error.fred: error: FRED_API_KEY is not set. Get a free key at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key.html and add to .env.
sources_error.kalshi_contracts:
not_implemented: adapter 'Kalshi' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: Kalshi event contract closing prices via https://trading-api.readme.io/reference/getmarkets (env KALSHI_EMAIL/PASSWORD) or third-party predictiondata.dev archive.
  Implement quant/adapters/kalshi.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.fed_speakers:
not_implemented: adapter 'Fed speakers' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: Fed speaker transcripts (FOMC, Beige Book, regional Feds) via https://www.federalreserve.gov/.
  Implement quant/adapters/fed speakers.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
